what_it_does: Lists a batch of CSS design-token files from the claude-ds project for allocation in a build-prep interpretation wave.
observations: Contains six entries, all from project claude-ds
All paths are under tokens/ and end in .css
All entries share the same absolute root /home/tim/company/design/claude-ds
Token domains covered: icons, imagery, layout, motion, provenance, sizing
No code symbols are present; only project/path/root metadata
standouts: Includes a provenance.css token file alongside more common token categories
All entries are grouped under a wave-002/alloc/batch-039 path
conventions: Uses a JSON array of uniform objects with project, path, and root keys
File paths are relative to a declared absolute root
Token files follow a tokens/<domain>.css naming pattern
concerns: No allocation rationale, ordering, or priority is stated
Root path is hardcoded to a user home directory
No version, timestamp, or batch criteria metadata
notes: A batch allocation list of six claude-ds CSS design-token files staged for wave-002 interpretation.
questions: Why were these six token files selected for batch-039?
What does provenance.css define relative to the other token files?
Does the array order imply processing sequence?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file path indicates an allocation batch and the content lists token files assigned to it.
intention_signals: It appears to stage a scoped subset of design tokens for downstream interpretation, fusion, or build processing.
novelty: The inclusion of a provenance.css token file is unusual among typical design-token categories.
contribution: Provides a scoped, project-local inventory of claude-ds CSS token files that a fused system could use to identify which source files belong to this allocation batch.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch listing six CSS design-token files (icons, imagery, layout, motion, provenance, sizing) from the claude-ds project rooted at /home/tim/company/design/claude-ds.
intention_for_embedding: To stage these token CSS files as batch-039 in wave-002 for build-prep interpretation.
